name: bmad-document-project
tagline: BMAD workflow that resolves layered config overrides then hands off to instructions.md to generate brownfield project documentation.
verdict: Clear trigger, deterministic config-merge rules, and a fallback if the resolver script fails. But no scope exclusions, no output contract or example for its own merge algorithm, no version signal, and the real work is deferred to an unseen instructions.md.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion text anywhere; body is silent on when not to use this BMAD workflow.
Output/deliverable shape is deferred entirely to unseen `./instructions.md`; nothing in this content defines the doc format.
TOML merge rule (scalars override, tables deep-merge, keyed arrays replace/append) has no worked example.
